repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
full_text_tesim: Single-folios are often joined to form bifolios for binding purposes
Codex with multiple signs of repair
Ff. 1-120 are parchment; ff. 121-128 are paper
Paper binding reinforcements with Arabic writing

Leather on wood, with stud holes on center of upper and lower outer boards; tooled lines on upper cover; incisions (secondary) on upper and lower covers; wooden peg extrudes from center of outside of upper board; remnant of leather loop on center of lower board; pastedowns of dark blue linen fabric on inner covers; total of seven metal studs along narrow edges of upper and lower boards
Binding intact with boards present and spine covered | Repair of outer board with tape; remnants of several repairs with glue
